book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve gastropub food and should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 4 people at 16:30 on wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the cheap price range and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the type of hotel
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about 2 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
